name: Tender & Tangy Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first nine ingredients in a slow cooker.
2. Cut the ribs into serving-size pieces; brown them in a skillet with oil.
3. Transfer the browned ribs to the slow cooker.
4. Cover and cook on low for 4-6 hours, or until tender.
5. Yield: 2-3 servings.
